filter.expression: supabase_project_ref = $supabase_project_ref AND service_type = $service_type AND mountpoint IN ['/data', '/'] AND service.name = $service.name
supabase_project_ref = $supabase_project_ref AND service_type = $service_type AND mountpoint IN ['/data', '/'] AND service.name = $service.name

display.name: Connection Pool Efficiency %
display.description: Percentage of max connections in use

display.name: Client Wait Time (sec)
display.description: Time clients spend waiting for server

display.name: Active DB Connections
display.description: Current active client connections to database

display.name: Disk I/O Time
display.description: Percentage of time disk was busy

display.name: Query Rate
display.description: Queries per second pooled by PgBouncer

display.name: Queries Pooled (by database)
display.description: Pooled queries per second by database

display.name: Cache Hit Ratio %
display.description: Percentage of queries served from cache

display.name: Cache & Buffers
display.description: Memory used for caching and buffers

filter.expression: supabase_project_ref = $supabase_project_ref AND service_type = $service_type AND mode != 'idle' AND service.name = $service.name

display.name: Average Query Duration
display.description: Average query execution time in milliseconds

display.name: Query Execution Time
display.description: Total query execution time per second

display.name: CPU Usage by Mode (%)
display.description: CPU usage breakdown by mode (user, system, iowait)

filter.expression: supabase_project_ref = $supabase_project_ref AND service_type = $service_type AND mode != idle AND service.name = $service.name
supabase_project_ref = $supabase_project_ref AND service_type = $service_type AND mode != idle AND service.name = $service.name

display.name: Server Connections (Idle)
display.description: Idle server connections ready for queries
